judge.rationale: The design correctly identifies all 10 reference domains (sessions, methodology, strategies, projects, triggers, tokens, registry, genesis, experiments, cluster) with accurate responsibilities and file counts—perfect structural match. All 6 required ports (EventBus, SessionPool, FileSystemProvider, YamlLoader, MethodologySource, NativeSessionDiscovery) are identified and their methods are correct, but formal TypeScript signatures are incomplete (parameter types, async/await patterns, return shapes are simplified). Documentation is clear and well-organized but lacks scenario walkthroughs, cohesion rationale, port-consumption matrix, and edge-case handling. The design emphasizes architecture first (domain descriptions before port definitions), presenting ports as a derived consequence rather than the primary deliverable—contradicting surface-first methodology.
